extra.reason: Implemented the V1 package, CLI wrapper lifecycle, Forgejo PR routing, docs, tests, and turn documentation.
Doctor now checks whether the managed shim is the first gh executable in PATH instead of requiring its directory to be first.
Auth discovery now reads fj's macOS Application Support keys.json, allowing Codex.app to find Forgejo auth without inherited token env vars.
Generated gh wrapper now invokes gh_forgejo_shim via the install-time Python executable, so it works in GUI app environments with stripped PATH.
Fixed gh pr status JSON envelope compatibility for Codex.app PR detection.
Added Forgejo-backed gh pr list and gh repo view routing, tests, docs, and refreshed the active pipx shim.
Moved the Diffs SSR requirement from repo-local AGENTS.md into the global Codex AGENTS.md and documented the change.
Added fallback GitHub CLI discovery, macOS GUI PATH install/uninstall commands, doctor checks, docs, tests, and turn documentation for GUI-launched app PATH failures.
Documented GitHub-style origin remote requirements for Forgejo checkouts in README.md.

Broadened README.md to document GitHub-style tool compatibility beyond PR workflows, including repository state, default branch, upstream tracking, commit/push UI, repo metadata, GUI PATH, and auth discovery.
fixed Codex.app PR board compatibility by normalizing PR board fields, accepting merged PR lists, and adding parse-safe pr checks output
implemented bootstrap command, gfj alias, README onboarding, tests, and turn documentation
Implemented Forgejo-backed gh compatibility for probed PR, issue, and repo view commands with tests and docs.
Closed as misfiled: the reported Sidebar crash was in /Users/kell/dev/oss-playground/dirtycode, not this repository.

Repaired the divergent Dolt remote by confirming the remote was an empty initialized history, force-pushing the local authoritative Beads history, and verifying bd dolt pull plus a clean remote clone.
Mapped Forgejo commit statuses into GitHub-shaped statusCheckRollup and gh pr checks output, with tests and documentation.
Implemented native auth login/import/status/logout with validated shim-owned token storage, docs, tests, and turn documentation.
README now reflects the current bootstrap, auth, GUI PATH, PR checks, issue, repo metadata, config, rollback, and development behavior.
Repaired islandflow routing by allowlisting git.dirtydishes.dev locally, then added a repo-aware doctor check and tests so stale Forgejo host allowlists are reported with an exact repair command.
fixed Codex availability regression by routing Forgejo auth/API identity probes through the shim, installed 0.1.1 locally, and validated GitHub delegation still works
Default gh pr create output now includes a Codex.app-recognized marker while preserving Forgejo URLs and JSON output.
Added docs/dev/testing.html with the recommended source, installed-wrapper, and Codex.app testing workflows for developers.
Implemented trace module and focused unit tests.
Implemented the temporary git recorder core with stdlib-only wrapper generation, sanitized JSONL trace records, cleanup helper, and fake-git unit tests.
Added opt-in gh trace capture, trace summaries, Codex smoke probes, temporary git recorder CLI/docs/tests, and consolidated turn documentation for probe-driven diagnostics.
Added docs/testing/codex-trace.html with the Codex trace capture, summary, git recorder, test conversion, and shim adaptation workflow.
Could not reproduce after inspecting installed pipx scripts; refreshed the pipx install and reinstalled the managed gh shim with --force. gfj --help and gh-forgejo-shim doctor now pass.
Created docs/implementation/rust-rewrite with IMPLEMENT.md, PLAN.html, phase documents, zero-Python target language, epic/phase bead links, dependencies, priorities, and subagent guidance.

phase 01 contract frozen: added compatibility-contract.v1 JSON fixtures, contract README, phase doc pointer, fixture tests, baseline timings, and verified with PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
review repaired PR contract fixture coverage and verified tests
phase 01 contract PR #17 merged after review: compatibility-contract.v1 fixtures, contract README, fixture tests, baseline timings, and reviewer repair commit 937bc4b are on main
phase 02 scaffold complete: Cargo workspace, Rust package and binaries, isolated CLI harness, contract loader, and Rust quality-gate docs added without wiring Rust into the installed Python workflow

review repair complete: removed hard-coded Rust version assertions, strengthened the CLI fixture harness for fake executables and system git access, documented the harness behavior, and reran Rust/Python quality gates
phase 02 scaffold PR #18 merged after review: Cargo workspace, Rust package/binaries, CLI fixture harness, contract loader, and scaffold docs are on main at d7eacd0
implemented Rust Forgejo HTTP client, normalization, field filtering, jq/template helpers, and contract fixture coverage; cargo test, clippy, and python unittest pass
phase 04 config/auth Rust port implemented and verified
phase 04 config/auth Rust port implemented and verified
Phase 03 native dispatcher and GitHub delegation implemented, verified, and ready for review.
review repairs implemented and verified with fmt, cargo test, clippy, and Python unittest suite
review repairs implemented and verified with fmt, cargo test, clippy, and Python unittest suite

Hardened Rust dispatcher trace redaction for sensitive key/value text, token prefixes, and URL credentials; fixed local FJ_SHIM_TRACE paths; verified with cargo fmt, clippy, cargo test, pytest, release build, and diff check.

implemented Rust read-only gh compatibility handlers for auth/api/repo/pr/issue families; verified with cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test --workspace, python3 -m unittest, python3 -m compileall -q src tests, and Rust-path auth/delegation smoke probes
implemented Rust auth login/import/logout write hardening with focused tests; full Rust crate and Python auth parity tests pass on clean auth branch
Implemented Rust PR comment and issue create/new handlers with stdin body-file support, auth/title/body failures, fake API unit coverage, and cargo test -p gh-forgejo-shim passing.
Implemented Rust PR checkout/co and git subprocess behavior with temp-repo tests; full gh-forgejo-shim Rust tests pass.
Implemented and verified Rust PR create/new parsing, body handling, fill behavior, and Codex-compatible created URL output in Phase 07.
Phase 07 mutating workflows ported to Rust and verified with fake Forgejo APIs, temporary git repos, Rust/Python gates, compileall, and diff checks.
Rust mutating --web workflows now launch browser URLs before printing them, matching the Python contract, with focused tests.
implemented Rust macOS GUI PATH LaunchAgent helpers and CLI wiring with isolated temp-home/fake-launchctl tests
Implemented Rust trace summarize, trace smoke, and git recorder create/run/remove with temp-only tests and recorder safety checks.
integrated shim lifecycle commands, marker/refusal behavior, and tests into phase 08
fixed git-recorder run deadlock by bypassing CLI stdout locks for the hidden wrapper runner; cli_scaffold recorder test now passes
ported Rust diagnostics/setup commands with tests and manual validation notes
rust git recorder now inherits stdin and streams stdout/stderr while preserving trace byte and excerpt recording
